Author: XeldarAlz
Name: Doman Mahjong Solver
Punchline: Doman Mahjong helper — hints or auto-play.
Description:
A helper for Doman Mahjong at the Gold Saucer. Two modes:

• Hint mode (default): shows the best tile to discard and a short explanation. You still click every move.
• Auto-play: the plugin watches the table and clicks for you with natural pacing.

Starts off by default. You must accept a short notice before auto-play can be turned on, and you can switch back to hints or turn it off at any time from the plugin window.
Changelog: v0.0.0.21 — review follow-ups from the v0.0.0.20 UI overhaul. MainWindow's Policy.Choose + DiscardScorer.Score are now computed once per frame in DrawLiveCard and passed into both the hand-row highlight and the suggestion panel, instead of each renderer calling them independently — a measurable win with the MCTS policy at 60Hz. Wind-tile glyphs now match the changelog's promise: 東 / 南 / 西 / 北 for winds, 白 / 發 / 中 for dragons (previously winds rendered as ASCII E/S/W/N, which disagreed with the shipped release notes). DebugOverlay's "addon not found" message enumerates MahjongAddon.CandidateNames ("Emj" or "EmjL") instead of hard-coding "Emj" — accurate for NA/EmjL clients. Small doc-comment fix to MainWindow clarifying that the DebugOverlay is reachable via Settings (once DevMode is enabled) or /mjauto debug at any time. No gameplay, detection, or command changes.
